docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEMONTE, CHAD
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 6-14-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-20-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, ISABELLA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEMONTE, CHAD AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, ISABELLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEMONTE, CHAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, ISABELLA $6,381.23 PRINCIPAL, $826.93 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,298.16, $6381.23 PRINCIPAL PLUS STATUTORY PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 7/1/2017 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,040.00 FILED BY DEMONTE, CHAD AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, ISABELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DEMONTE, CHAD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, ISABELLA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-17-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 9/7/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "REFUSED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHAD DELMONTE. DEFENDANT ISABELLA DIAZ DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-20-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CHAD DEMONTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
